  "file_path": "/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py",
  "limit": 15,
  "offset": 511
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "\n    direction : 'backward' (default), 'forward', or 'nearest'\n        Whether to search for prior, subsequent, or closest matches.\n    indicator : bool or str, default False\n        If True, adds a column named '_merge' with information on the source\n        of each row ('both', 'left_only', or 'right_only').\n        If a str, uses the string as the column name instead.\n\n    Returns\n    -------\n    DataFrame\n\n    See Also\n    --------\n    merge : Merge with a database-style join.",
    "filePath": "/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py",
    "numLines": 15,
    "startLine": 511,
    "totalLines": 2793
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "file": {
    "content": "    _merge_type = \"asof_merge\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        left: DataFrame | Series,\n        right: DataFrame | Series,\n        on: IndexLabel | None = None,\n        left_on: IndexLabel | None = None,\n        right_on: IndexLabel | None = None,\n        left_index: bool = False,\n        right_index: bool = False,\n        by=None,\n        left_by=None,\n        right_by=None,\n        suffixes: Suffixes = (\"_x\", \"_y\"),\n        how: Literal[\"asof\"] = \"asof\",\n        tolerance=None,\n        allow_exact_matches: bool = True,\n        direction: str = \"backward\",\n        indicator: str | bool = False,\n    ) -> None:\n        self.by = by\n        self.left_by = left_by\n        self.right_by = right_by\n        self.tolerance = tolerance\n        self.allow_exact_matches = allow_exact_matches\n        self.direction = direction\n\n        # check 'direction' is valid\n        if self.direction not in [\"backward\", \"forward\", \"nearest\"]:",
    "filePath": "/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py",
    "numLines": 30,
    "startLine": 1968,

}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "    def __init__(\n        self,\n        left: DataFrame | Series,\n        right: DataFrame | Series,\n        on: IndexLabel | None = None,\n        left_on: IndexLabel | None = None,\n        right_on: IndexLabel | None = None,\n        left_index: bool = False,\n        right_index: bool = False,\n        suffixes: Suffixes = (\"_x\", \"_y\"),\n        fill_method: str | None = None,\n        how: JoinHow | Literal[\"asof\"] = \"outer\",\n        indicator: str | bool = False,\n    ) -> None:\n        self.fill_method = fill_method\n        _MergeOperation.__init__(\n            self,\n            left,\n            right,\n            on=on,\n            left_on=left_on,\n            left_index=left_index,\n            right_index=right_index,\n            right_on=right_on,\n            how=how,\n            suffixes=suffixes,\n            sort=True,  # factorize sorts\n            indicator=indicator,\n        )\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py",
    "numLines": 30,
    "startLine": 1903,
    "totalLines": 2793
  },
  "type": "text"
}
69. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py",
  "limit": 30,
  "offset": 2308
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "\n    def get_result(self, copy: bool | None = True) -> DataFrame:\n        if self.indicator:\n            self.left, self.right = self._indicator_pre_merge(self.left, self.right)\n\n        join_index, left_indexer, right_indexer = self._get_join_info()\n\n        result = self._reindex_and_concat(\n            join_index, left_indexer, right_indexer, copy=copy\n        )\n        result = result.__finalize__(self, method=self._merge_type)\n\n        if self.indicator:\n            result = self._indicator_post_merge(result)\n\n        self._maybe_add_join_keys(result, left_indexer, right_indexer)\n\n        self._maybe_restore_index_levels(result)\n\n        return result.__finalize__(self, method=\"merge\")\n\n\ndef _get_multiindex_indexer(\n    join_keys: list[ArrayLike], index: MultiIndex, sort: bool\n) -> tuple[npt.NDArray[np.intp], npt.NDArray[np.intp]]:\n    # left & right join labels and num. of levels at each location\n    mapped = (\n        _factorize_keys(index.levels[n]._values, join_keys[n], sort=sort)\n        for n in range(index.nlevels)\n    )",
    "filePath": "/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py",
    "numLines": 30,
    "startLine": 2308,
    "totalLines": 2793
  },
  "type": "text"
}

{
  "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"\nBasic validation script for merge_asof indicator support.\nThis script checks that the code structure is correct without running full tests.\n\"\"\"\nimport sys\nimport ast\n\ndef check_file_syntax(filepath):\n    \"\"\"Check if a Python file has valid syntax.\"\"\"\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r') as f:\n            ast.parse(f.read())\n        print(f\"\u2713 {filepath} has valid syntax\")\n        return True\n    except SyntaxError as e:\n        print(f\"\u2717 {filepath} has syntax error: {e}\")\n        return False\n\ndef check_function_signature(filepath, func_name, required_param=None):\n    \"\"\"Check if a function has a specific parameter.\"\"\"\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r') as f:\n            tree = ast.parse(f.read())\n\n        for node in ast.walk(tree):\n            if isinstance(node, ast.FunctionDef) and node.name == func_name:\n                arg_names = [arg.arg for arg in node.args.args]\n                if required_param and required_param in arg_names:\n                    print(f\"\u2713 Function '{func_name}' has parameter '{required_param}'\")\n                    return True\n                elif required_param:\n                    print(f\"\u2717 Function '{func_name}' missing parameter '{required_param}'\")\n                    return False\n                else:\n                    print(f\"\u2713 Found function '{func_name}'\")\n                    return True\n\n        print(f\"\u2717 Function '{func_name}' not found in {filepath}\")\n        return False\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"\u2717 Error checking {filepath}: {e}\")\n        return False\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Run validation checks.\"\"\"\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n    print(\"Basic Validation for merge_asof indicator support\")\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n\n    all_ok = True\n\n    # Check syntax\n    print(\"\\n1. Checking syntax...\")\n    all_ok &= check_file_syntax(\"/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py\")\n    all_ok &= check_file_syntax(\"/workspace/pandas/tests/reshape/merge/test_merge_asof.py\")\n\n    # Check function signatures\n    print(\"\\n2. Checking function signatures...\")\n    all_ok &= check_function_signature(\n        \"/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py\",\n        \"merge_asof\",\n        \"indicator\"\n    )\n\n    # Check if _AsOfMerge has indicator in __init__\n    print(\"\\n3. Checking class signatures...\")\n    all_ok &= check_function_signature(\n        \"/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py\",\n        \"__init__\",  # This is a bit loose but should work\n    )\n\n    # Check test cases\n    print(\"\\n4. Checking test functions...\")\n    test_functions = [\n        \"test_merge_asof_indicator\",\n        \"test_merge_asof_indicator_with_custom_name\",\n        \"test_merge_asof_indicator_no_matches\",\n        \"test_merge_asof_indicator_false\"\n    ]\n\n    with open(\"/workspace/pandas/tests/reshape/merge/test_merge_asof.py\", 'r') as f:\n        test_content = f.read()\n        for test_func in test_functions:\n            if f\"def {test_func}(\" in test_content:\n                print(f\"\u2713 Test function '{test_func}' found\")\n            else:\n                print(f\"\u2717 Test function '{test_func}' not found\")\n                all_ok = False\n\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n    if all_ok:\n        print(\"\u2713 All validation checks passed!\")\n        return 0\n    else:\n        print(\"\u2717 Some validation checks failed\")\n        return 1\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    sys.exit(main())\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/test_indicator_basic.py"
}

  "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"\nBasic validation script for merge_asof indicator support.\nThis script checks that the code structure is correct without running full tests.\n\"\"\"\nimport sys\nimport ast\n\ndef check_file_syntax(filepath):\n    \"\"\"Check if a Python file has valid syntax.\"\"\"\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r') as f:\n            ast.parse(f.read())\n        print(f\"\u2713 {filepath} has valid syntax\")\n        return True\n    except SyntaxError as e:\n        print(f\"\u2717 {filepath} has syntax error: {e}\")\n        return False\n\ndef check_function_signature(filepath, func_name, required_param=None):\n    \"\"\"Check if a function has a specific parameter.\"\"\"\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r') as f:\n            tree = ast.parse(f.read())\n\n        for node in ast.walk(tree):\n            if isinstance(node, ast.FunctionDef) and node.name == func_name:\n                arg_names = [arg.arg for arg in node.args.args]\n                if required_param and required_param in arg_names:\n                    print(f\"\u2713 Function '{func_name}' has parameter '{required_param}'\")\n                    return True\n                elif required_param:\n                    print(f\"\u2717 Function '{func_name}' missing parameter '{required_param}'\")\n                    return False\n                else:\n                    print(f\"\u2713 Found function '{func_name}'\")\n                    return True\n\n        print(f\"\u2717 Function '{func_name}' not found in {filepath}\")\n        return False\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"\u2717 Error checking {filepath}: {e}\")\n        return False\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Run validation checks.\"\"\"\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n    print(\"Basic Validation for merge_asof indicator support\")\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n\n    all_ok = True\n\n    # Check syntax\n    print(\"\\n1. Checking syntax...\")\n    all_ok &= check_file_syntax(\"/workspace/pandas/core/reshape/merge.py\")\n    all_ok &= check_file_syntax(\"/workspace/pandas/tests/reshape/merge/test_merge_asof.py\")\n\n    # Check function signatures\n    print(\"\\n2. {
  "file_path": "/workspace/pandas/tests/reshape/merge/test_merge_asof.py",
  "new_string": "def test_merge_asof_indicator_false():\n    # Test that indicator=False doesn't add _merge column\n    left = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"]})\n    right = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7], \"right_val\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7]})\n\n    result = merge_asof(left, right, on=\"a\", indicator=False)\n\n    # Check that _merge column does not exist\n    assert \"_merge\" not in result.columns\n\n\ndef test_merge_asof_indicator_with_by():\n    # Test indicator works with by parameter\n    left = pd.DataFrame(\n        {\n            \"time\": pd.to_datetime([\"2016-05-25 13:30:00\", \"2016-05-25 13:30:01\"]),\n            \"ticker\": [\"MSFT\", \"AAPL\"],\n            \"left_val\": [100, 200],\n        }\n    )\n    right = pd.DataFrame(\n        {\n            \"time\": pd.to_datetime([\"2016-05-25 13:30:00\", \"2016-05-25 13:30:02\"]),\n            \"ticker\": [\"MSFT\", \"AAPL\"],\n            \"right_val\": [10, 20],\n        }\n    )\n\n    result = merge_asof(left, right, on=\"time\", by=\"ticker\", indicator=True)\n\n    # Check that _merge column exists\n    assert \"_merge\" in result.columns\n    assert result[\"_merge\"].dtype.name == \"category\"",
  "old_string": "def test_merge_asof_indicator_false():\n    # Test that indicator=False doesn't add _merge column\n    left = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"]})\n    right = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7], \"right_val\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7]})\n\n    result = merge_asof(left, right, on=\"a\", indicator=False)\n\n    # Check that _merge column does not exist\n    assert \"_merge\" not in result.columns",
  "replace_all": false
}

\"us\", \"ns\"])\ndef unit(request):\n    \"\"\"\n    Resolution for datetimelike dtypes.\n    \"\"\"\n    return request.param\n\n\nclass TestAsOfMerge:\n    def prep_data(self, df, dedupe=False):\n df[\"quantity\"].astype(\"int64\")\n        df[\"bid\"] = df[\"bid\"].astype(\"float64\")\n        df[\"ask\"] = df[\"ask\"].astype(\"float64\")\n        return self.prep_data(df)\n\n    def test_examples1(self):\n        \"\"\"doc-string examples\"\"\"\n        left = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"]})\n        right = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7], \"right_val\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7]})\n\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"], \"right_val\": [1, 3, 7]}\n        )\n\n        result = merge_asof(left, right, on=\"a\")\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_examples2(self, unit):\n        \"\"\"doc-string examples\"\"\"\n        if unit == \"s\":\n            pytest.skip(\n                \"This test is invalid for unit='s' because that would \"\n                \"round the trades['time']]\"\n            )\n        trades = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.038\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    ]\n                ).astype(f\"M8[{unit}]\"),\n                \"ticker\": [\"MSFT\", \"MSFT\", \"GOOG\", \"GOOG\", \"AAPL\"],\n                \"price\": [51.95, 51.95, 720.77, 720.92, 98.00],\n                \"quantity\": [75, 155, 100, 100, 100],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"price\", \"quantity\"],\n        )\n\n        quotes = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.030\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.041\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.049\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.072\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.075\",\n                    ]\n                ).astype(f\"M8[{unit}]\"),\n                \"ticker\": [\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"MSFT\",\n                    \"MSFT\",\n                    \"MSFT\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"AAPL\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"MSFT\",\n                ],\n                \"bid\": [720.50, 51.95, 51.97, 51.99, 720.50, 97.99, 720.50, 52.01],\n                \"ask\": [720.93, 51.96, 51.98, 52.00, 720.93, 98.01, 720.88, 52.03],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"bid\", \"ask\"],\n        )\n\n        merge_asof(trades, quotes, on=\"time\", by=\"ticker\")\n\n        merge_asof(trades, quotes, on=\"time\", by=\"ticker\", tolerance=Timedelta(\"2ms\"))\n\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.038\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    ]\n                ).astype(f\"M8[{unit}]\"),\n                \"ticker\": [\"MSFT\", \"MSFT\", \"GOOG\", \"GOOG\", \"AAPL\"],\n                \"price\": [51.95, 51.95, 720.77, 720.92, 98.00],\n                \"quantity\": [75, 155, 100, 100, 100],\n                \"bid\": [np.nan, 51.97, np.nan, np.nan, np.nan],\n                \"ask\": [np.nan, 51.98, np.nan, np.nan, np.nan],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"price\", \"quantity\", \"bid\", \"ask\"],\n        )\n\n        result = merge_asof(\n            trades,\n            quotes,\n            on=\"time\",\n            by=\"ticker\",\n            tolerance=Timedelta(\"10ms\"),\n            allow_exact_matches=False,\n        )\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_examples3(self):\n        \"\"\"doc-string examples\"\"\"\n        # GH14887\n\n        left = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"]})\n        right = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7], \"right_val\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7]})\n\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"], \"right_val\": [1, 6, np.nan]}\n        )\n\n        result = merge_asof(left, right, on=\"a\", direction=\"forward\")\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_examples4(self):\n        \"\"\"doc-string examples\"\"\"\n        # GH14887\n\n        left = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"]})\n        right = pd.DataFrame({\"a\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7], \"right_val\": [1, 2, 3, 6, 7]})\n\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\"a\": [1, 5, 10], \"left_val\": [\"a\", \"b\", \"c\"], \"right_val\": [1, 6, 7]}\n        )\n\n        result = merge_asof(left, right, on=\"a\", direction=\"nearest\")\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_basic(self, trades, asof, quotes):\n        expected = asof\n\n        result = merge_asof(trades, quotes, on=\"time\", by=\"ticker\")\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_basic_categorical(self, trades, asof, quotes):\n        expected = asof\n        trades.ticker = trades.ticker.astype(\"category\")\n        quotes.ticker = quotes.ticker.astype(\"category\")\n        expected.ticker = expected.ticker.astype(\"category\")\n\n        result = merge_asof(trades, quotes, on=\"time\", by=\"ticker\")\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_basic_left_index(self, trades, asof, quotes):\n        # GH14253\n        expected = asof\n        trades = trades.set_index(\"time\")\n\n        result = merge_asof(\n            trades, quotes, left_index=True, right_on=\"time\", by=\"ticker\"\n        )\n        # left-only index uses right\"s index, oddly\n        expected.index = result.index\n        # time column appears after left\"s columns\n        expected = expected[result.columns]\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_basic_right_index(self, trades, asof, quotes):\n        expected = asof\n        quotes = quotes.set_index(\"time\")\n\n        result = merge_asof(\n            trades, quotes, left_on=\"time\", right_index=True, by=\"ticker\"\n        )\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_basic_left_index_right_index(self, trades, asof, quotes):\n        expected = asof.set_index(\"time\")\n        trades = trades.set_index(\"time\")\n        quotes = quotes.set_index(\"time\")\n\n        result = merge_asof(\n            trades, quotes, left_index=True, right_index=True, by=\"ticker\"\n        )\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_multi_index_left(self, trades, quotes):\n        # MultiIndex is prohibited\n        trades = trades.set_index([\"time\", \"price\"])\n        quotes = quotes.set_index(\"time\")\n        with pytest.raises(MergeError, match=\"left can only have one index\"):\n            merge_asof(trades, quotes, left_index=True, right_index=True)\n\n    def test_multi_index_right(self, trades, quotes):\n        # MultiIndex is prohibited\n        trades = trades.set_index(\"time\")\n        quotes = quotes.set_index([\"time\", \"bid\"])\n        with pytest.raises(MergeError, match=\"right can only have one index\"):\n            merge_asof(trades, quotes, left_index=True, right_index=True)\n\n    def test_on_and_index_left_on(self, trades, quotes):\n        # \"on\" parameter and index together is prohibited\n        trades = trades.set_index(\"time\")\n        quotes = quotes.set_index(\"time\")\n        msg = 'Can only pass argument \"left_on\" OR \"left_index\" not both.'\n        with pytest.raises(MergeError, match=msg):\n            merge_asof(\n                trades, quotes, left_on=\"price\", left_index=True, right_index=True\n            )\n\n    def test_on_and_index_right_on(self, trades, quotes):\n        trades = trades.set_index(\"time\")\n        quotes = quotes.set_index(\"time\")\n        msg = 'Can only pass argument \"right_on\" OR \"right_index\" not both.'\n        with pytest.raises(MergeError, match=msg):\n            merge_asof(\n                trades, quotes, right_on=\"bid\", left_index=True, right_index=True\n            )\n\n    def test_basic_left_by_right_by(self, trades, asof, quotes):\n        # GH14253\n        expected = asof\n\n        result = merge_asof(\n            trades, quotes, on=\"time\", left_by=\"ticker\", right_by=\"ticker\"\n        )\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_missing_right_by(self, trades, asof, quotes):\n        expected = asof\n\n        q = quotes[quotes.ticker != \"MSFT\"]\n        result = merge_asof(trades, q, on=\"time\", by=\"ticker\")\n        expected.loc[expected.ticker == \"MSFT\", [\"bid\", \"ask\"]] = np.nan\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_multiby(self):\n        # GH13936\n        trades = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.046\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.050\",\n                    ]\n                ),\n                \"ticker\": [\"MSFT\", \"MSFT\", \"GOOG\", \"GOOG\", \"AAPL\"],\n                \"exch\": [\"ARCA\", \"NSDQ\", \"NSDQ\", \"BATS\", \"NSDQ\"],\n                \"price\": [51.95, 51.95, 720.77, 720.92, 98.00],\n                \"quantity\": [75, 155, 100, 100, 100],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"exch\", \"price\", \"quantity\"],\n        )\n\n        quotes = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.030\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.041\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.045\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.049\",\n                    ]\n                ),\n                \"ticker\": [\"GOOG\", \"MSFT\", \"MSFT\", \"MSFT\", \"GOOG\", \"AAPL\"],\n                \"exch\": [\"BATS\", \"NSDQ\", \"ARCA\", \"ARCA\", \"NSDQ\", \"ARCA\"],\n                \"bid\": [720.51, 51.95, 51.97, 51.99, 720.50, 97.99],\n                \"ask\": [720.92, 51.96, 51.98, 52.00, 720.93, 98.01],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"exch\", \"bid\", \"ask\"],\n        )\n\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.046\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.050\",\n                    ]\n                ),\n                \"ticker\": [\"MSFT\", \"MSFT\", \"GOOG\", \"GOOG\", \"AAPL\"],\n                \"exch\": [\"ARCA\", \"NSDQ\", \"NSDQ\", \"BATS\", \"NSDQ\"],\n                \"price\": [51.95, 51.95, 720.77, 720.92, 98.00],\n                \"quantity\": [75, 155, 100, 100, 100],\n                \"bid\": [np.nan, 51.95, 720.50, 720.51, np.nan],\n                \"ask\": [np.nan, 51.96, 720.93, 720.92, np.nan],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"exch\", \"price\", \"quantity\", \"bid\", \"ask\"],\n        )\n\n        result = merge_asof(trades, quotes, on=\"time\", by=[\"ticker\", \"exch\"])\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    @pytest.mark.parametrize(\"dtype\", [\"object\", \"string\"])\n    def test_multiby_heterogeneous_types(self, dtype):\n        # GH13936\n        trades = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.046\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.050\",\n                    ]\n                ),\n                \"ticker\": [0, 0, 1, 1, 2],\n                \"exch\": [\"ARCA\", \"NSDQ\", \"NSDQ\", \"BATS\", \"NSDQ\"],\n                \"price\": [51.95, 51.95, 720.77, 720.92, 98.00],\n                \"quantity\": [75, 155, 100, 100, 100],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"exch\", \"price\", \"quantity\"],\n        )\n        trades = trades.astype({\"ticker\": dtype, \"exch\": dtype})\n\n        quotes = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.030\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.041\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.045\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.049\",\n                    ]\n                ),\n                \"ticker\": [1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2],\n                \"exch\": [\"BATS\", \"NSDQ\", \"ARCA\", \"ARCA\", \"NSDQ\", \"ARCA\"],\n                \"bid\": [720.51, 51.95, 51.97, 51.99, 720.50, 97.99],\n                \"ask\": [720.92, 51.96, 51.98, 52.00, 720.93, 98.01],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"exch\", \"bid\", \"ask\"],\n        )\n        quotes = quotes.astype({\"ticker\": dtype, \"exch\": dtype})\n\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            {\n                \"time\": to_datetime(\n                    [\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.046\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                        \"20160525 13:30:00.050\",\n                    ]\n                ),\n                \"ticker\": [0, 0, 1, 1, 2],\n                \"exch\": [\"ARCA\", \"NSDQ\", \"NSDQ\", \"BATS\", \"NSDQ\"],\n                \"price\": [51.95, 51.95, 720.77, 720.92, 98.00],\n                \"quantity\": [75, 155, 100, 100, 100],\n                \"bid\": [np.nan, 51.95, 720.50, 720.51, np.nan],\n                \"ask\": [np.nan, 51.96, 720.93, 720.92, np.nan],\n            },\n            columns=[\"time\", \"ticker\", \"exch\", \"price\", \"quantity\", \"bid\", \"ask\"],\n        )\n        expected = expected.astype({\"ticker\": dtype, \"exch\": dtype})\n\n        result = merge_asof(trades, quotes, on=\"time\", by=[\"ticker\", \"exch\"])\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(result, expected)\n\n    def test_mismatched_index_dtype(self):\n        # similar to test_multiby_indexed, but we change the dtype on left.index\n        left = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                [to_datetime(\"20160602\"), 1, \"a\"],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160602\"), 2, \"a\"],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160603\"), 1, \"b\"],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160603\"), 2, \"b\"],\n            ],\n            columns=[\"time\", \"k1\", \"k2\"],\n        ).set_index(\"time\")\n        # different dtype for the index\n        left.index = left.index - pd.Timestamp(0)\n\n        right = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                [to_datetime(\"20160502\"), 1, \"a\", 1.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160502\"), 2, \"a\", 2.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160503\"), 1, \"b\", 3.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160503\"), 2, \"b\", 4.0],\n            ],\n            columns=[\"time\", \"k1\", \"k2\", \"value\"],\n        ).set_index(\"time\")\n\n        msg = \"incompatible merge keys\"\n        with pytest.raises(MergeError, match=msg):\n            merge_asof(left, right, left_index=True, right_index=True, by=[\"k1\", \"k2\"])\n\n    def test_multiby_indexed(self):\n        # GH15676\n        left = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                [to_datetime(\"20160602\"), 1, \"a\"],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160602\"), 2, \"a\"],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160603\"), 1, \"b\"],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160603\"), 2, \"b\"],\n            ],\n            columns=[\"time\", \"k1\", \"k2\"],\n        ).set_index(\"time\")\n\n        right = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                [to_datetime(\"20160502\"), 1, \"a\", 1.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160502\"), 2, \"a\", 2.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160503\"), 1, \"b\", 3.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160503\"), 2, \"b\", 4.0],\n            ],\n            columns=[\"time\", \"k1\", \"k2\", \"value\"],\n        ).set_index(\"time\")\n\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                [to_datetime(\"20160602\"), 1, \"a\", 1.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160602\"), 2, \"a\", 2.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160603\"), 1, \"b\", 3.0],\n                [to_datetime(\"20160603\"), 2, \"b\", 4.0],\n            ],\n            columns=[\"time\", \"k1\", \"k2\", \"value\"],\n        ).set_index(\"time\")\n\n        result = merge_asof(\n            left, right, left_index=True, right_index=True, by=[\"k1\", \"k2\"]\n        )\n\n        tm.assert_frame_equal(expected, result)\n\n        with pytest.raises(\n            MergeError, match=\"left_by and right_by must be the same length\"\n        ):\n            merge_asof(\n                left,\n                right,\n                left_index=True,\n                right_index=True,\n                left_by=[\"k1\", \"k2\"],\n                right_by=[\"k1\"],\n            )\n\n    def test_basic2(self, datapath):\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.023\",\n                    \"MSFT\",\n                    \"51.95\",\n                    \"75\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"51.95\",\n                    \"51.95\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.038\",\n                    \"MSFT\",\n                    \"51.95\",\n                    \"155\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"51.95\",\n                    \"51.95\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"720.77\",\n                    \"100\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"720.5\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"720.92\",\n                    \"100\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"720.5\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                    \"200\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"720.5\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                    \"300\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"720.5\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                    \"600\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"720.5\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.048\",\n                    \"GOOG\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                    \"44\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"720.5\",\n                    \"720.93\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.074\",\n                    \"AAPL\",\n                    \"98.67\",\n                    \"478343\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    np.nan,\n                    np.nan,\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.075\",\n                    \"AAPL\",\n                    \"98.67\",\n                    \"478343\",\n                    \"NASDAQ\",\n                    \"98.55\",\n                    \"98.56\",\n                ],\n                [\n                    \"20160525 13:30:00.075\",\n
